name: Swift Title Loans
description_short: Swift Title Loans at 2119 E Hillsborough Ave c1, Tampa, FL 33610 in the Belmont Heights neighborhood is Mon-Fri 9:00 AM – 7:00 PM. Call +1 813-590-5373.
description_long:
Swift Title Loans operates a Memphis, Tennessee location at 1473 S Trezevant St, specializing in car title loans as a fast cash solution. The company positions itself in the emergency lending space, offering same-day funding to applicants regardless of credit history. Their marketing emphasizes accessibility for borrowers with poor credit scores and bankruptcy histories, removing traditional credit-based barriers to qualification.

The company's core offering is title-secured loans ranging from $100 to $50,000, allowing borrowers to access cash while retaining vehicle use during the loan term. They advertise online application capability, same-day cash disbursement when approved by noon, and the ability to repay the loan and reclaim the vehicle title. The physical Memphis location operates Monday-Friday 9am-7pm and Saturday 10am-5pm, with phone support available at 1-888-903-0217 and email at service@swiftloans.com.

Customer reviews consistently highlight the staff member Alfred for patient, clear communication and straightforward application processes. Multiple reviewers noted competitive rates compared to regional finance alternatives and appreciation for the transparent explanation of terms. The company emphasizes security infrastructure with 256-bit SSL and TLS encryption for online applications, suggesting focus on protecting customer data during the application process.

Reviews reveal genuine positive experiences but also indicate this is a high-risk lending product. While customers appreciated fast access to cash and non-discriminatory credit policies, the collateral-based nature and typical title loan economics (not detailed on the site) mean borrowers should carefully evaluate repayment capacity. The consistent mention of "competitive rates" in reviews appears somewhat generic, and the company does not publish specific APR or fee structures on the provided website content, which is a notable transparency gap for this lending category.
address: 2119 E Hillsborough Ave c1, Tampa, FL 33610

company_info.headquarters: 2119 E Hillsborough Ave c1, Tampa, FL 33610

pros: Same-day funding when applications signed by noon
Accepts applicants with bad credit, past bankruptcies, and poor credit scores without disqualification
Loan range from $100-$50,000 accommodates both small emergency needs and larger amounts
Allows borrowers to keep and use their vehicle during loan repayment period
Online application option available for convenience
256-bit SSL and TLS security encryption for online applications
Staff noted for patient, clear explanations of loan terms and straightforward application process
cons: No APR, fees, or interest rates disclosed on website—borrowers cannot comparison shop before applying
Title loans carry collateral risk; vehicle forfeiture possible if loan defaults
Limited payment plan options per multiple customer reviews
Physical location signage clarity issues noted by first-time visitors
Typical title loan products carry high cost of borrowing relative to traditional personal loans
best_for: Borrowers with bad credit or bankruptcy history unable to qualify for traditional personal loans
Those needing emergency cash of $100-$2,000 with same-day funding capability
Vehicle owners who can pledge a car title and need funds for unexpected expenses within weeks-to-months timeframe
diagnosis: Swift Title Loans is best for borrowers facing urgent cash needs ($100-$2,000 typically) who cannot qualify for traditional loans due to poor credit or bankruptcy history and own a vehicle outright. The primary caveat is that title loans are expensive short-term debt products with significant collateral risk; the company's lack of rate transparency on its website makes it impossible to pre-assess true cost before application, and borrowers should only pursue this option if repayment is highly feasible within the loan term.
services: Car title loans ($100-$2,000 standard range; up to $50,000)
Same-day cash funding (when signed by noon)
No-collateral personal loans (per reviews, though primarily title-based)
Loans for applicants with bad credit
Loans for applicants with past bankruptcies
Vehicle title retention during loan repayment
In-person application at Memphis physical location
